text:
<think>I should start by stating the initial number of each type of cookie Randy has, as this sets up the problem clearly.</think>
Randy starts with 9 oatmeal cookies, 4 chocolate chip cookies, and 5 sugar cookies.
<think>Now, I need to describe the first action: he eats one of each flavor, so I should subtract one from each type and show the new totals.</think>
After eating one of each flavor, he has 8 oatmeal cookies, 3 chocolate chip cookies, and 4 sugar cookies.
<think>Next, he eats 2 more oatmeal cookies for lunch, so I should subtract 2 from the oatmeal total and update the count.</think>
After lunch, he has 6 oatmeal cookies, 3 chocolate chip cookies, and 4 sugar cookies.
<think>He then gives away 2 sugar cookies, so I should subtract 2 from the sugar cookie count and update the numbers.</think>
After giving away 2 sugar cookies, he has 6 oatmeal cookies, 3 chocolate chip cookies, and 2 sugar cookies.
<think>Now, he bakes 4 more of each flavor, so I should add 4 to each type and show the new totals.</think>
After baking, he has 10 oatmeal cookies, 7 chocolate chip cookies, and 6 sugar cookies.
<think>Finally, I need to sum all the cookies to get the total number he has now, and present the answer after #### as requested.</think>
#### 23
